description: Route this task to the correct category shuttle when similar category names exist. The Weave config declares two categories with similar names: `category client-frontend { patterns ["src/4.Presentation/DST.Client/**"] }` and `category client-mobile { patterns ["src/4.Presentation/DST.Mobile/**"] }`. The file being changed is `src/4.Presentation/DST.Client/Components/Header.tsx`. Which shuttle agent should handle this — `shuttle-client-frontend` or `shuttle-client-mobile`?
